# NovaCore Global FZE

> Export and commercial division of an ISO-certified lubricant manufacturer in Ras Al Khaimah, United Arab Emirates. Manufactures engine, industrial and marine lubricants, greases and base oils, and offers private-label and white-label programs for distributors worldwide.

## Company
- Brand: NovaCore Global FZE (export & commercial division)
- Manufacturing entity (group factory, certificate holder): Lubcon Oil Based Lubricanting Manufacturing L.L.C
- Facility: Al Hamra Industrial Zone Free Zone (NFZ), Ras Al Khaimah, UAE (WIZN5-10, Shed N5)
- Contact: Sazonov Kliment — +971 56 333 3025 — WhatsApp wa.me/971563333025 — Telegram t.me/beretta_chin

## Certifications (held by the group manufacturing entity)
- ISO 9001:2015 (Quality) — Cert No. LUB/QMS/L25/5484 — valid until 17.12.2028
- ISO 14001:2015 (Environmental) — Cert No. LUB/EMS/L25/2238 — valid until 17.12.2028
- ISO 45001:2018 (Health & Safety) — Cert No. LUB/OHS/L25/3613 — valid until 17.12.2028
- Accreditation: United Accreditation Foundation (UAF), IAF member. Verifiable at saaracertification.com.

## Products
- Motor Oils, Diesel Engine Oils, Transmission & Gear Oils (incl. ATF), Industrial & Hydraulic Oils, Marine Lubricants, Greases, Coolants / Brake Fluids & Base Oils.
- Pack sizes from 700 ml to 208 L drums and bulk. Formulated to API, ACEA and OEM specifications.

## Services
- Private Label, White Label, and Export.

## Regions supplied
- GCC & Middle East, Europe, Russia & CIS, Africa, Latin America, Asia.

## Languages
- English, Arabic, Russian, Spanish, Portuguese.

## Pages
- /products — full lubricant portfolio
- /manufacturing — facility, lab, QC, additive technology, logistics
- /certifications — ISO certificates with numbers and verification
- /private-label — private/white label manufacturing
- /about — group structure and export experience
- /contact — quote requests and distributor inquiries
